imageMessage.caption: Success means even more when you never forget the people who helped you reach it. ❤️
Wow! 😍
Sometimes, the greatest victory isn't winning a crown—it's refusing to let others define your worth. 👑❤️
92 years! 🤯
He still lives in a 400 sq ft room! 🤯
Facts 😂
Boys will be boys 😂
That's me 😂

🦜🏠 A missing parrot in Japan found his way home in the most incredible way.

After flying away, Yosuke stayed silent with police but later told a veterinarian his full name and home address, allowing authorities to reunite him with his family. 📍💚

His owners had spent two years teaching him the information—proving that the training paid off in the most unexpected way. 🧠✨
Mistake happens 🥹

pollCreationMessageV3.name: What's your immediate reaction when the Wi-Fi goes down?

options.optionName: 🛜 Stare into the abyss waiting for it to return
🏃‍♂️ Sprint to the router to unplug it and plug it back in

extendedTextMessage.text:
My visit to Seychelles has been filled with substantive outcomes that will boost the India-Seychelles friendship. I can confidently say that while the past fifty years of our relationship have been marked by deep trust and shared progress, the next fifty years will be defined by innovation, sustainability and shared prosperity.

I am happy to have joined the National Day celebrations and that too during the time when Seychelles marks 50 years of Independence. I thank President Herminie, the Government and people of Seychelles for their affection.

https://youtu.be/urdw2FFr38k

Hot day in Chennai. Looking at the skies it appears localised development through sea Breeze looks less likely. But satellite image indicates good moisture push from the West so possibly we may see storms develop later in the evening moving in from interiors.

imageMessage.caption: Parts of South Delta may see some moderate rains from the storms that gave rains earlier over Pudukottai district. Like yesterday parts of Villupuram and Cuddalore may see light / moderate rains from the storms currently seen over Salem dt as it moves closer to the coast. As of now except for some isolated storms around Bengaluru nothing much seen closer to Chennai latitude. Need to see if something develops later in the evening

videoMessage.caption: Light rains are reported at many places around Chennai. These are not Thunderstorms but rains from moisture pushed by monsoon from the West. Drizzle could continue for about 15 / 20 minutes

svara-TTS is free and open source under the Apache 2.0 license, so you can:
✅ Use it for free.
✅ Run it locally.
✅ Modify it.
✅ Use it in commercial projects (subject to the Apache 2.0 license terms). �
Hugging Face +1
However, keep in mind:
You'll need a reasonably capable GPU to run the full model comfortably. The original model is large, and there are quantized versions that reduce memory usage. �
Hugging Face +1
Based on what I know about your SHRRI AI project, svara-TTS is currently one of the strongest free options for a single voice capable of English and Tamil, with better support for mixed-language speech than older Indic TTS models. �
Hugging Face +1
